title: Export List
excerpt: I really love the new Group By feature.  However, when I export the list to excel, it exports in the original groups instead of one ‘clean’ list.  It would be nice if the actual group by view would export to excel instea…

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I really love the new Group By feature. However, when I export the list to excel, it exports in the original groups instead of one ‘clean’ list. It would be nice if the actual group by view would export to excel instead of reverting to groups each entry is in.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: I was thrilled to see this request! I fully support a ‘Clean List’ export, as I often spend a lot of time formatting data into a usable list for reports and other tasks. It would be fantastic if the Group were a column and all the data were presented in a list without any breaks.

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @awright and @Clarey

Just in case you are okay in using third party apps, you might want to try out our apps Exported Excel Cleaner or Spreadsheet Gorilla to create and export plain Excel spreadsheets.

– Markus

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Marcus. Thanks for joining in on this. I had checked out both those apps. They export entire boards which requires a lot of cleanup. I want to export a list from a board in monday.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I am looking for this too.
